# supervis

> DeepSeek-powered supervisor that drives Claude Code autonomously through software projects.

## Docs

* [README](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/README.md) — install, usage, configuration
* [Changelog](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) — version history
* [Full docs (single file)](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/llms-full.txt) — everything in one context-window-friendly file
* [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/supervis/) — package page

## Overview

supervis is a CLI tool that uses DeepSeek V3.2 (with thinking mode) as a project manager to orchestrate Claude Code. You describe what you want, DeepSeek breaks it into steps, sends each step to Claude Code, and keeps going until the task is complete. Project-specific instructions can be loaded from `.supervis/SUPERVIS.md`.

## Quick start

```bash
pipx install supervis
cd myproject
supervis
```

Requires Claude Code CLI and a DeepSeek API key.
